rationale: The cited paper is a classic content-virality study (emotion/arousal drivers of sharing), and the citing paper also models content-rich social-media outcomes (TikTok impressions with multimodal content controls), so a substantive theoretical/background role is plausible. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop but not strong enough to clearly keep.
